###############################################################################
# arm_compat_generated_tiers.txt
# Generated by Tools/build_builtin_compat_profiles.py
###############################################################################

arm_assign_power_tier_blackice = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 26 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 53 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 100 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 170 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 225 (220+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 245 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 215 (220-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 235 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 160 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 90 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 43 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 0 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 16 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_RELAXED }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_AGGRESSIVE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = arm_old_tier_index } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_cold_war_iron_curtain = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 45 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 95 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 185 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 315 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 225 (220+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 455 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 215 (220-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 445 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 305 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 175 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 85 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 0 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 35 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_RELAXED }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_AGGRESSIVE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = arm_old_tier_index } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_kaiserreich = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 27 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 55 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 105 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 175 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 225 (220+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 255 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 215 (220-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 245 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 165 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 95 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 45 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 0 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 17 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_RELAXED }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_AGGRESSIVE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = arm_old_tier_index } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_endsieg = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 25 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 50 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 95 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 155 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 225 (220+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 225 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 215 (220-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 215 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 145 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 85 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 40 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 0 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 15 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_RELAXED }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_AGGRESSIVE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = arm_old_tier_index } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_extended_tech_tree_1960 = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 25 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 50 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 95 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 155 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 225 (220+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 225 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 215 (220-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 215 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 145 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 85 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 40 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 0 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 15 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_RELAXED }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_AGGRESSIVE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = arm_old_tier_index } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_novum_vexillum = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 38 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 80 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 155 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 265 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 225 (220+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 385 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 215 (220-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 375 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 255 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 145 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 70 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 0 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 28 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_RELAXED }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_AGGRESSIVE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = arm_old_tier_index } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_rise_of_nations = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 40 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 85 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 165 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 285 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 225 (220+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 405 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 215 (220-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 395 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 275 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 155 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 75 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 0 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 30 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_RELAXED }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_AGGRESSIVE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = arm_old_tier_index } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_kaiserredux = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 27 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 55 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 107 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 180 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 225 (220+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 260 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 215 (220-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 250 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 170 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 97 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 45 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 0 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 17 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_RELAXED }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_AGGRESSIVE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = arm_old_tier_index } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_the_new_order = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 30 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 65 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 125 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 210 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 225 (220+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 305 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 215 (220-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 295 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 200 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 115 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 55 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 0 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 20 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_RELAXED }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_AGGRESSIVE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = arm_old_tier_index } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_millennium_dawn = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 40 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 85 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 165 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Promote 3 -> 4 (Regional -> Great Power) requires > 155 (150+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 285 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Promote 4 -> 5 (Great Power -> Superpower) requires > 225 (220+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 5 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 405 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # DEMOTIONS (descending — only if currently above)
    # Threshold - 5 hysteresis to demote
    # ===================================================

    # Demote 5 -> 4 (Superpower -> Great Power) if score < 215 (220-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 4 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 395 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 }
    }

    # Demote 4 -> 3 (Great Power -> Regional) if score < 145 (150-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 3 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 275 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 }
    }

    # Demote 3 -> 2 (Regional -> Minor Industrial) if score < 85 (90-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 155 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Demote 2 -> 1 (Minor Industrial -> Minor) if score < 40 (45-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 75 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Demote 1 -> 0 (Minor -> Micro) if score < 15 (20-5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index > 0 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power < 30 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Base lag by tier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 3.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 4.5 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_base_lag = 6.0 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Quarterly cap by tier
    # Superpower=6, Great=5, Regional=4, MinorInd=3, Minor=2, Micro=1
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 6 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 5 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 4 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 3 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 7 — Grant cap modifier
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_STRICT }
        }
        # Divide by 2, round up: add 1 then divide by 2 (integer)
        add_to_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 1 }
        divide_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 2 }
        # Clamp to at least 1
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_quarterly_cap min = 1 max = 999 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_grant_cap option = ARM_CAP_UNLIMITED }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_quarterly_cap = 999 }
    }
    # ARM_CAP_STANDARD: use as-is (no change)

    # ===================================================
    # Rule 2 — Intensity modifier on base lag
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_RELAXED }
        }
        add_to_variable = { arm_base_lag = 1.0 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            has_game_rule = { rule = arm_auto_research_intensity option = ARM_AGGRESSIVE }
        }
        subtract_from_variable = { arm_base_lag = 0.5 }
        clamp_variable = { var = arm_base_lag min = 0 max = 40 }
    }

    # ===================================================
    # Set tier average for competence bonus calculations
    # ===================================================
    if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 5 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 90 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 4 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 65 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 3 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 40 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 25 }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 } }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 12 }
    }
    else = {
        set_variable = { arm_tier_avg = 5 }
    }

    # --- Fire tier change event if tier changed ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { check_variable = { arm_tier_index = arm_old_tier_index } }
            NOT = { has_game_rule = { rule = arm_notifications option = ARM_NOTIFY_SILENT } }
        }
        country_event = { id = arm_event.2 }
    }
}

arm_assign_power_tier_the_fire_rises = {

    # --- Initialize tier if it has never been set ---
    if = {
        limit = {
            NOT = { has_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 0 }
        set_country_flag = arm_tier_initialized
    }

    # Save old tier for change detection
    set_variable = { arm_old_tier_index = arm_tier_index }

    # ===================================================
    # PROMOTIONS (ascending — only if currently below)
    # Threshold + 5 hysteresis to promote
    # ===================================================

    # Promote 0 -> 1 (Micro -> Minor) requires > 25 (20+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 1 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 40 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 1 }
    }

    # Promote 1 -> 2 (Minor -> Minor Industrial) requires > 50 (45+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 2 }
            check_variable = { arm_global_power > 90 }
        }
        set_variable = { arm_tier_index = 2 }
    }

    # Promote 2 -> 3 (Minor Industrial -> Regional) requires > 95 (90+5)
    if = {
        limit = {
            check_variable = { arm_tier_index < 3 }
